case_title: ANTHONY ROSE VIRAY VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIRAY, ANTHONY ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC DBA FLYWHEEL TAXI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY ROSE VIRAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SAMUEL BRAY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,902.52 FILED BY VIRAY, ANTHONY ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC DBA FLYWHEEL TAXI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIRAY, ANTHONY ROSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC DBA FLYWHEEL TAXI $931.51 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $976.51, 60% OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIM ($1552.52) IS 931.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
